title: 4 Setting up Billers on the Electronic Bill Payments System
body_text:
4	Setting up Billers on the Electronic Bill Payments System
4.1	Overview of Setting up Billers on the Electronic Bill Payments System
Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System allows your financial institution to submit customer-initiated bill payments to Central 1 for further distribution to participating billers. You can promote this service to new billers and you can help enroll them on the system free of charge.
Billers that choose to participate in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System must be registered with their own financial institution. This ensures due diligence and increases CentralВ 1ГўВҖВҷs level of security. If a biller is registered with your financial institution, CentralВ 1 can set up the biller on the system with minimal effort. If a biller is registered with a different financial institution (e.g., Royal Bank), the biller should initiate enrollment through that financial institution. In this case, the billerГўВҖВҷs financial institution can send the enrollment information to CentralВ 1 to facilitate the billerГўВҖВҷs set-up with CentralВ 1 and other financial institutions.
The biller must also sign an agreement with Central 1. Central 1 provides each biller with detailed transaction information (e.g., through the Secure Report Distribution system) and credits the biller according to the method agreed upon during enrollment.
There are two ways to enroll a biller in the Electronic Bill Payments System, but in both cases, the biller must be registered with a lead bank:
If you want Central 1 to coordinate enrollment with the biller, submit a new biller request on ServiceNow.
If you want to assist the new biller with enrollment, download the enrollment forms and agreement and provide them directly to the biller.
4.2	Submitting a New Biller Request on ServiceNow
The procedures in this section describe how to enroll a biller on the Electronic Bill Payments System if the financial institution wants Central 1 to coordinate enrollment with the biller. Submit an enrollment request via ServiceNow as follows:
To log in to ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Service Catalogue
Select
Central 1 Support
, then select
New Biller Request
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Central 1 Support ГўВҖВ“ New Biller Request
Complete the New Biller Request page as follows. See Figure 6.
Note:	Mandatory fields are indicated with an asterisk.
ГўВ‘
Enter the billerГўВҖВҷs name and contact information.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Use the drop-down menu to select the volume of transactions.
ГўВ‘Вў
Enter any additional information youГўВҖВҷd like to communicate to Central 1.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Select
Submit
. The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Figure 6: New Biller Request
4.3	Providing Enrollment Documents to a Biller
The procedures in this section describe how to enroll a biller on the Electronic Bill Payments System if the financial institution wants to assist the biller with enrollment. Download the Electronic Bill Payments System enrollment documents from the Secure Site Forms Library and provide them to the biller. Alternatively, access the forms on the EBP Biller Listing.
To access the biller enrollment forms on the EBP Biller Listing:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 7.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 7: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
EBP Biller Listing
. See Figure 9.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 9: Accessing EBP Biller Listing
Select
Forms
. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Forms Page on EBP Biller Listing
Download the following forms and provide them to the biller.
ГўВҲВ’
Biller Enrollment Request, Form 1320
ГўВҖВ“
This form is used to enroll the biller in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System. It specifies the billerГўВҖВҷs region, contact information, category (e.g., utilities or insurance), account validation rules, reporting preference, settlement preference, and indicates if the biller is a restricted entity. See Figure 11 and Figure 12.
Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following requirements for biller account validation rules, where the biller must
ГўВ‘
Indicate if customer account numbers are alpha only, numeric only, or a combination.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Indicate the minimum length of customer account numbers if they are of varying lengths.
ГўВ‘Вў
Indicate the maximum length of customer account numbers if they are of varying lengths (canГўВҖВҷt exceed 20 characters).
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Enter the number of characters if customer account numbers have a fixed length.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Select
Yes
or
No
to
indicate if customer account numbers contain a special check digit formula (e.g., LuhnГўВҖВҷs Mod 10).
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Describe how the check digit is calculated and provide six valid sample account numbers, if applicable.
Figure 11: Biller Enrollment Request, Form 1320, Page 1
Figure 12: Biller Enrollment Request, Form 1320, Page 2
ГўВҲВ’
Electronic Payment Consolidation and Settlement Agreement, Form 1333
ГўВҖВ“
This agreement is made between Central 1 and the biller and is required to enroll the biller on Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: Electronic Payment Consolidation and Settlement Agreement, Form 1333
ГўВҲВ’
SRD Administrator Appointment Request ГўВҖВ“ Secure Report Distribution, Form 2356
ГўВҖВ“
This form is used to provide the biller with access to the Secure Report Distribution (SRD) system. Billers can use SRD to access their electronic bill payment reports. See Figure 14.
Figure 14: SRD Administrator Appointment Request ГўВҖВ“ Secure Report Distribution, Form 2356
Advise the biller to contact Central 1, Client Support Services for assistance in completing the documents and to discuss report and settlement options.
Advise the biller to send the completed documents to Central 1.
